action.reasoning: Observation: IC_mean=0.0017, model early-stopped at 8 rounds - severe underfitting. Analysis: Learning rate too high, need better hyperparameters and feature preprocessing. Decision: Lower LR to 0.01, increase rounds to 5000, add feature preprocessing (fillna, clip outliers), try cross-sectional rank normalization.
